# ~~setPortEnv()~~

> **Test Support Layer**

```ts
function setPortEnv(value: string): void;
```

Defined in: [src/app/testing/utility/env.utility.ts:44](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/testing/utility/env.utility.ts#L44)

Sets the `PORT` environment variable to a given value.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type     | Description                                 |
| --------- | -------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `value`   | `string` | The port string to assign (e.g., `"4000"`). |

## Returns

`void`

## Deprecated

No longer imported by any test.  Use
`ConfigProvider.fromMap` with Effect’s `Config` module instead.

## Remarks

Assigns `process.env.PORT` directly.  Callers should call
[clearPortEnv](clearPortEnv.md) in an `afterEach` block to avoid leaking
state between tests.
